purpose: Design philosophy, pipeline stages, and module map in one file

principles: Each generation stage is a separate focused LLM call — never one giant prompt
Providers are fully interchangeable — same BaseProvider interface, different backends
Prompts are external .md files loaded at runtime — never inline Python strings
Templates are Jinja2 .j2 files — never f-strings for document assembly
Assembler stage is pure Python — no LLM in final document construction
All LLM calls are async — asyncio.run() called exactly once in cli.py
Fail loud: never write a partial document, always surface errors with full context
Three extension seams only: BaseProvider, Jinja2 templates, lifecycle hooks

pipeline_stages.name: entities
pipeline_stages.on_failure: fallback to minimal entities from IntakeResult.related_entities — log WARNING, do not raise

pipeline_stages.name: assemble
pipeline_stages.on_failure: raise AssemblerError — should never happen with valid inputs

module_map.ucgen/cli.py: Typer CLI. All commands. Zero business logic — delegates entirely.
module_map.ucgen/generator.py: Orchestrates 4-stage pipeline. Only module that calls providers.
module_map.ucgen/assembler.py: Pure Python Jinja2 renderer. No LLM. Takes all stage results, returns markdown string.
module_map.ucgen/schema.py: All Pydantic v2 models. Single source of truth for data shapes.
module_map.ucgen/config.py: Loads .ucgenrc.toml project then home. Returns typed Config object.
module_map.ucgen/project_runner.py: Reads ucgen.yaml, orchestrates multi-use-case runs. Tier 2 feature.
module_map.ucgen/validator.py: Validates existing .md use case files against ucgen schema.
module_map.ucgen/exporter.py: Converts UseCaseDocument to JSON or YAML string.
module_map.ucgen/errors.py: All custom exception classes. Single file.
module_map.ucgen/providers/ollama.py: OllamaProvider — async httpx to local Ollama REST API.
module_map.ucgen/providers/anthropic_provider.py: AnthropicProvider — official anthropic SDK via asyncio.to_thread.
module_map.ucgen/providers/openai_provider.py: OpenAICompatibleProvider — openai AsyncClient. Covers OpenAI, Groq, Together, LM Studio.
module_map.ucgen/utils/json_extract.py: extract_json(raw) — robustly extracts JSON from LLM output with commentary.
module_map.ucgen/utils/table_formatter.py: format_table(raw) — normalizes markdown table column widths.
module_map.ucgen/utils/prompt_loader.py: load_prompt(name) — loads and caches prompt .md files.
module_map.ucgen/prompts/system_base.md: Shared persona injected into every stage system prompt.
module_map.ucgen/templates/cockburn-full.md.j2: Full Cockburn format with all fields.
module_map.ucgen/templates/enterprise.md.j2: Enterprise format with NFRs, scale hints, state machine.
